  <EventData>
    <Data>Sigma rule match found: Explorer Process Tree Break (see Details tab for more information)</Data>
    <Data>Module: Sigma</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Title: Explorer Process Tree Break</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Author: Florian Roth, Nasreddine Bencherchali</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Description: Detects a command line process that uses explorer.exe to launch arbitrary commands or binaries, which is similar to cmd.exe /c, only it breaks the process tree and makes its parent a new instance of explorer spawning from "svchost"</Data>
    <Data>Rule_FalsePositives: Unknown how many legitimate software products use that method</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Id: 949f1ffb-6e85-4f00-ae1e-c3c5b190d605</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Level: medium</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Link: https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/0.22-120-geb87ed8f4/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_explorer_break_proctree.yml</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Modified: 2022/06/14</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Path: public\windows\process_creation\proc_creation_win_susp_explorer_break_proctree.yml</Data>
    <Data>Rule_References: https://twitter.com/CyberRaiju/status/1273597319322058752, https://twitter.com/bohops/status/1276357235954909188?s=12, https://twitter.com/nas_bench/status/1535322450858233858, https://securityboulevard.com/2019/09/deobfuscating-ostap-trickbots-34000-line-javascript-downloader/</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Sigtype: public</Data>
    <Data>CommandLine: C:\Windows\explorer.exe /factory,{75dff2b7-6936-4c06-a8bb-676a7b00b24b} -Embedding</Data>
    <Data>Company: Microsoft Corporation</Data>
    <Data>Computer: Agamemnon</Data>
    <Data>Correlation_ActivityID: {00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000}</Data>
    <Data>CurrentDirectory: C:\Windows\system32\</Data>
    <Data>Description: Windows Explorer</Data>
    <Data>EventID: 1</Data>
    <Data>Execution_ProcessID: 2996</Data>
    <Data>Execution_ThreadID: 4520</Data>
    <Data>FileVersion: 10.0.20348.740 (WinBuild.160101.0800)</Data>
    <Data>Hashes: SHA1=F05F5C6E0D36A0D62117F676014FAB534BFB3C36,MD5=B78C1196853BBC069D18018A6947DECA,SHA256=079935E23A762F2E078BAFA44C3BED10F1E565A16784039330F133DE82410802,IMPHASH=BECD30EE79098B21A5BA5E5CF0E18B83</Data>
    <Data>Image: C:\Windows\explorer.exe</Data>
    <Data>IntegrityLevel: High</Data>

    <Data>Level: 4</Data>
    <Data>LogonGuid: {33bce98f-eae7-6326-4e38-290000000000}</Data>

    <Data>Match_Strings: /factory,{75dff2b7-6936-4c06-a8bb-676a7b00b24b} in CommandLine</Data>
    <Data>Opcode: 0</Data>
    <Data>OriginalFileName: EXPLORER.EXE</Data>
    <Data>ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\svchost.exe -k DcomLaunch -p</Data>
    <Data>ParentImage: C:\Windows\System32\svchost.exe</Data>
    <Data>ParentProcessGuid: {33bce98f-e9fc-6326-0d00-000000000600}</Data>
